title: Rewrite pilot content with high-quality scene_expansion_items
objective: Rewrite scene_expansion_items for the three pilot scenes so the fourth pool is default-safe and useful for gameplay.
requirements: 桌面+学习 includes quality examples like 桌面日历, 桌面小风扇, 护眼书架, 桌面收纳抽屉 or equivalents.
公园+野餐 includes quality examples like 折叠野餐桌, 便携冷藏箱, 户外收纳箱, 野餐遮阳布 or equivalents.
海底+潜水 uses concrete equipment/storage/work objects, not animal bodies, transparent/glowing/reflective objects, or thin rope/net objects.
Default pools must not contain image-anchor-dependent, thin/string-like, transparent, reflective, glowing, animal-body, or micro-detail terms.
acceptance_criteria: All scene_expansion_items are medium-or-larger, common, boundary-clear, independently circleable, and scene-relevant.
No item requires unobservable image facts such as visible monitor, whiteboard, umbrella pole, wall hook, or available side space.
No risk-pattern term appears in default pools.
verification: Manual review of the three pilot bundles.

result.summary: Rewrote scene_expansion_items for 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, and 公园+野餐 using medium-or-larger default-safe scene enrichment objects.
